name: io.github.jiayuanliang0716-max/arbitova
description: On-chain USDC escrow and AI arbitration for A2A payments on Base. Non-custodial — your agent signs locally; Arbitova never holds funds.

environmentVariables.name: ARBITOVA_RPC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base JSON-RPC URL. Sepolia: https://sepolia.base.org — Mainnet: https://mainnet.base.org

environmentVariables.name: ARBITOVA_USDC_ADDRESS
environmentVariables.description: USDC token address on your chosen network. Sepolia: 0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e — Mainnet: 0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913

environmentVariables.name: ARBITOVA_AGENT_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your agent's wallet private key (0x-prefixed). Optional — omit for read-only mode where only arbitova_get_escrow works. Signs locally; never sent to Arbitova.
